notes: All 15 responses are highly consistent and accurate on the primary psycopg2.OperationalError and the verbatim connection-failure message (db.internal / 10.0.0.5 / port 5432 / user "app" / password authentication failed) plus the db.py:18 frame and a correct root-cause diagnosis. No response hallucinated content. Differences are minor: a few reps (t0.4/rep1, t0.7/rep2) reproduce the full 'File "/Users/alice/app/db.py", line 18, in connect' frame verbatim and rank highest; t0.7/rep0 is docked slightly for a 'missing password' misreading. Universal omissions across the set: none mention the secondary ConnectionError, the main.py:42 frame (db = connect(DB_URL)), or the exit code 1 — a systematic blind spot rather than per-response error. Temperature (0.1/0.4/0.7) produced no meaningful accuracy spread.
